task_completion.description: The agent opened and read the standard operating procedure.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor, file viewer, or terminal window displaying the contents of ~/Documents/focus_procedure.txt.

task_completion.description: The agent targeted the star Vega in the astronomy software.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The planetarium software (e.g., KStars) or telescope control interface shows 'Vega' as the active target, centered in the field of view, or selected in the mount controls.

task_completion.description: The agent executed the 9-point focus run.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The focus module (e.g., Ekos Focus) shows a V-curve graph being plotted, a sequence of exposures being taken, or a file manager/terminal shows 9 FITS files generated in /home/ga/Images/focus_run.

task_completion.description: The agent parked the focuser at the determined optimal focus position.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The focuser control panel shows the absolute position set to a value between 28000 and 42000, which corresponds to the minimum HFR (Half-Flux Radius) on the V-curve.

task_completion.description: The agent took a verification exposure after setting the optimal focus.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The camera capture interface shows a newly captured image or a 'capture complete' status occurring chronologically after the focuser was moved to the optimal position.

task_completion.description: The agent generated the required calibration report.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal showing the newly created file /home/ga/Documents/focus_report.txt containing the optimal focus value.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual astronomy software GUI to perform the focus run.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent actively clicking and using the astronomy software (like KStars/Ekos) rather than just writing a script to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: The optimal focus value in the report matches the actual findings from the software.
integrity.visual_evidence: The focus value written in focus_report.txt should match the minimum point of the V-curve or the final parked position visible in the focuser GUI.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands to spoof the FITS images.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal commands like 'touch' or 'echo' used to create fake .fits files in the /home/ga/Images/focus_run directory.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target star is Vega (RA 18.6156h, Dec +38.7836°). The optimal focus position must fall between 28000 and 42000. The focus run should generate exactly 9 FITS files in /home/ga/Images/focus_run. The final calibration report must be saved at /home/ga/Documents/focus_report.txt.
